Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.htmlpage

Class PrettyPrintStream

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.htmlpage.PrettyPrintStream
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPrettyPrintStream
public class PrettyPrintStream extends Object implements IPrettyPrintStream
Class used to hold the pretty print stream.
Since:
1.2

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    appendComment(ICommentedElement element)
    Append the comment attached to this element, if any.
    void
    appendEmptyLine()
    Appends an empty line to the given stream hold by the given string builder.
    void
    appendKeyword(String str)
    Appends a keyword to the current stream according to the stream's current level of indentation.
    void
    appendLevelBegin()
    Method that appends to the given string builder the beginning of indentation at a given level.
    void
    appendLevelEnd()
    Method that appends to the given string builder the end of indentation of a given level.
    void
    appendString(String s, String begin, String end, String beginSeparator, String endSeparator)
    Method to be used by contributors to pretty print an element.
    void
    decrementLevel()
    Decrements the current level of indentation
    int
    getCurrentLevel()
    Returns the current level of indentation
    StringBuilder
    getStringBuilder()
    Returns the string builder associated with this stream.
    void
    incrementLevel()
    Increments the current level of indentation
    void
    setCurrentLevel(int currentLevel)
    Sets the current level of indentation

  • Method Details

    • getStringBuilder

      public StringBuilder getStringBuilder()
      Returns the string builder associated with this stream.

    • getCurrentLevel

      public int getCurrentLevel()
      Returns the current level of indentation

      Sets the current level of indentation

    • incrementLevel

      public void incrementLevel()
      Description copied from interface: IPrettyPrintStream
      Increments the current level of indentation
      Specified by:
      incrementLevel in interface IPrettyPrintStream

    • decrementLevel

      public void decrementLevel()
      Description copied from interface: IPrettyPrintStream
      Decrements the current level of indentation
      Specified by:
      decrementLevel in interface IPrettyPrintStream

    • appendComment

      public void appendComment(ICommentedElement element)
      Append the comment attached to this element, if any.
      Parameters:
      element - the commented element

    • appendString

      public void appendString(String s, String begin, String end, String beginSeparator, String endSeparator)
      Method to be used by contributors to pretty print an element.
      Specified by:
      appendString in interface IPrettyPrintStream
      Parameters:
      s - the element corresponding string to be appended (for example, an identifier, a label, a predicate string...)
      begin - the string that should be appended before the element string, which is typically retrieved by getElementBegin() and is used to create the html structure
      end - the string that should be appended after the element string, which is typically retrieved by getElementEnd() and is used to create the html structure
      beginSeparator - the separator beginning to be appended
      endSeparator - the separator ending to be appended

    • appendLevelEnd

      public void appendLevelEnd()
      Method that appends to the given string builder the end of indentation of a given level.
      Specified by:
      appendLevelEnd in interface IPrettyPrintStream

    • appendLevelBegin

      public void appendLevelBegin()
      Method that appends to the given string builder the beginning of indentation at a given level.
      Specified by:
      appendLevelBegin in interface IPrettyPrintStream

    • appendKeyword

      public void appendKeyword(String str)
      Description copied from interface: IPrettyPrintStream
      Appends a keyword to the current stream according to the stream's current level of indentation.
      Specified by:
      appendKeyword in interface IPrettyPrintStream
      Parameters:
      str - the string corresponding to the keyword

    • appendEmptyLine

      public void appendEmptyLine()
      Appends an empty line to the given stream hold by the given string builder.
      Specified by:
      appendEmptyLine in interface IPrettyPrintStream
